arts.ttl: England boss Thomas Tuchel slammed by World Cup winner over 'damaging' style
arts.sum: World Cup winner Philipp Lahm has warned England to be weary of his compatriot Thomas Tuchel's tendency for conflict despite hailing the new manager as one of the game's great tacticians

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Myles Lewis-Skelly receives Ashley Cole comparison verdict after record-breaking England debut
arts.sum: It is 'impossible not to feel' that Myles Lewis-Skelly could be Arsenal's new Ashley Cole, but comparisons are premature, expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole

arts.ttl: Key attribute Myles Lewis-Skelly boasts that will take him to the top with Arsenal and England
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly has enjoyed a meteoric rise with Arsenal and England this season – and he owes a lot of his recent success to his mentality, as well as his talent

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: Premier League rival of Man United become 'favourites' to sign Bayern Munich, England striker
arts.sum: A Premier League club, which is not Manchester United, reportedly emerge as the 'favourites' to sign Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Branthwaite expected to consider Everton future after England snub
arts.sum: Jarrad Branthwaite is expected to further consider his Everton future after being left out of Thomas Tuchel's first England squad, Sky Sports News understands.

arts.ttl: How England should line up vs Latvia with Thomas Tuchel making 5 changes
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel, who called on his wingers to make more of an impact, gets another look at his new England squad at Wembley on Monday night when Latvia arrive for a World Cup qualifier

arts.ttl: England: Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden face pivotal night in bid to stay in Thomas Tuchel's plans
arts.sum: With Anthony Gordon, Bukayo Saka and Cole Palmer to come back in, Tuchel does not need to persist with forwards who are not performing

arts.ttl: England vs Latvia LIVE: Thomas Tuchel looking for improved performance from second World Cup qualifier
arts.sum: The Three Lions won their first qualifier 2-0 against Albania but the manager hopes to see more attacking threat tonight

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel 'makes three squad changes' for England-Latvia clash as Liverpool man returns
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Tino Livramento is reportedly left out of the England squad for Monday's World Cup 2026 qualifier with Latvia at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Three England players hoping to impress against Latvia as Thomas Tuchel plots changes
arts.sum: Tottenham star among those looking to make an impact in World Cup qualifier at Wembley
